context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the UGC collection pipeline (three channels, data model, post-purchase email timing) and the product page display API (filtering, ordering, response shape, pagination defaults).

checklist.name: Three collection channels
checklist.description: Implementation references or supports all three collection channels: post-purchase email requests, hashtag monitoring, and direct upload widget (not just one or two)

checklist.name: UGCSubmission source values
checklist.description: The source field type includes all four values: 'hashtag', 'email-request', 'widget', 'review-photo'

checklist.name: UGCSubmission status values
checklist.description: The status field type includes all five values: 'pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'rights-requested', 'rights-granted'

checklist.name: 14-day email delay
checklist.description: Post-purchase UGC request email is scheduled with a 14-day delay after delivery (not a different delay period)

checklist.name: Email incentive text
checklist.description: Post-purchase email payload includes an incentive referencing 10% off for approved posts

checklist.name: Duplicate ingest prevention
checklist.description: Hashtag ingestion checks whether a post with the same external ID already exists before creating a new submission record

checklist.name: Display: rights-granted only
checklist.description: The product UGC display API filters submissions to only those with status 'rights-granted'

checklist.name: Display: engagementScore order
checklist.description: The display API orders results by engagementScore descending

checklist.name: Display: default limit=12
checklist.description: The display API uses a default limit of 12 items per page (not another number)

checklist.name: Display: thumbnailUrl in response
checklist.description: The display API response includes thumbnailUrl for each item

checklist.name: Display: contentUrl in response
checklist.description: The display API response includes contentUrl (the original post URL) for each item

checklist.name: Display: total count included
checklist.description: The display API response includes a total count of rights-granted submissions for that product (not just the paginated items)
